function J(J)return Q[J-(473534+-414016)]end for J,b in ipairs({{-760508+760509;-395914+398712},{235622+-235621,-231686-(-234082)};{939446+-937049,751268-748470}})do while b[-720350-(-720351)]<b[303505+-303503]do local J=string.len local b=type local I=string.char local h=string.sub local P=math.floor local R=Q local return(function(Q,I,h,P,R,k,j,V,X,n,S,s,Y,K,b,W,A,x,N,O,C,G,q,m,L)C,V,b,G,q,O,X,N,S,K,L,x,Y,A,n,W,s,m=function(Q,J)local I=N(J)local h=function(...)return b(Q,{...},J,I)end return h
